name: Quectel Wireless Solutions Co., Ltd.
summary: Quectel Wireless Solutions Co., Ltd engages in the research, manufacture, and supply of industrial-grade cellular and Global Navigation Satellite System (GNSS) modules worldwide. The company offers 4G, 3G, 2G, automotive, smart, LPWA (Low Power Wide Area), GNSS IoT modules, as well as short range modules and EVB kits, including LTE, LTE-A, LPWA, UMTS/HSPA(+), GSM/GPRS, and GNSS modules; and technical support services. Its wireless modules are used in telematics and transport, energy, payment, security, smart city, gateway, industrial IoT, life and healthcare, and agriculture and environment industries. The company offers its products through distributors. Quectel Wireless Solutions Co., Ltd was founded in 2010 and is based in Shanghai, China.
